semantics.membership: dual: in-use flag +$00 ($00 empty/$01 farm/$02 party) + party list $CA8D count / $CA8E-$CA90 slot indices ($FF=empty); synced by ReadPartySlotInfo ($01 entry 5)
semantics.party_note: party slots are NOT fixed at 0-2; the list points at arbitrary array indices (compaction keeps occupied slots contiguous but party members can sit anywhere among them)
semantics.exp_shares: party member: total/eligible_party_count (+1 if 3, -1 if 1 — rounding quirk); farm monster: total/16 EACH; eggs (+$63!=0), KO'd party (+$4A bit7), level 99, and level>=cap (+$4C) receive none. Total in $DD23-$DD25.
semantics.staging_slots: GetMonsterDataPtr indices $14 ($D665) / $15 ($D6FA): breeding parents, trade transit, menu scratch; inside the $C8EA-$D9E9 save image
semantics.battle_position_cache: $DA15-$DA17 := validated party list (bank $51 LoadBtlS_40d1 via $01 entry 7)
